name: payfit
description: Reads PayFit legacy /v1 resources and current company-scoped PayFit API resources; writes supported JSON customer-key mutations.

risk.read: external PayFit API read of HR, contract, payroll-status, absence, accounting, and document-metadata data
risk.write: external PayFit API mutations for collaborator, contract, absence, and health-insurance/provident-fund workflows
risk.approval: write actions require explicit reverse-ETL approval; absence cancellation is idempotent-delete modeled
